problem.title: Sum of Gcd of Formed Pairs

approaches.title: Sort prefix GCD values and pair extremes
approaches.summary: Computes each element's GCD with the running maximum, sorts the resulting values, then sums GCDs of mirrored pairs. Later revisions only refactor the scan and-p

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using an explicit loop to build prefix GCDs and two pointers to pair sorted extremes.

revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 3867: more functional, less mutable state
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactors prefix construction and pair summation into iterator-based expressions while preserving the same algorithm.

revisions.commitComment: encapsulate state change of max within a scan
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 3867: encapsulate state change of max within a scan
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses scan to encapsulate the running-maximum state during prefix GCD construction; pairing and sorting remain unchanged.
